channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Trump shares SNL skit mocking Starmer as he speaks to UK PM over Iran war
item.description: Trump shares SNL-style skit mocking Starmer's panic over his call, the day the two leaders spoke about the war in Iran.

item.title: Has Iran brought down an ‘unkillable’ US F-35 jet?
item.description: The supersonic fighter jet is designed to avoid detection by radar and other technologies.

item.title: Trump postpones military strikes on Iranian power plants for five days
item.description: The US president's announcement comes after he held ‌'good and ​productive conversations' with Tehran.

item.title: Iraq pulled into Iran war as US targets Iran-aligned groups
item.description: Iraq is increasingly caught between the US and Iran as the regional war escalates, deepening economic woes.

item.title: Threats over Iran war bare Trump efforts to transform free speech: Experts
item.description: Threat to punish broadcasters for coverage not in 'public interest' comes amid wider roll-backs, analysts say.

item.title: IRGC spokesman tells US President Donald Trump ‘You’re fired!’
item.description: Spokesman for the IRGC took jabs at US president Trump, mimicking his catchphrases and language.

item.title: ‘Unprecedented’: Israel, US carry out extensive strikes across Iran
item.description: Tehran hit by 'wide-scale wave of strikes' as US President Trump extends deadline for Iran to reopen Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: China ‘is playing the long game’ in Iran war by staying neutral
item.description: Han Shen Lin, director of the China Office at the Asia Consultative Group, says that China is likely to remain neutral,

item.title: Iran war: What’s happening on day 24 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: The region is on edge as Trump's deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz or face attacks on power plants nears.

item.title: IEA chief warns of ‘very severe’ global energy crisis
item.description: IEA may release more oil as the Iran war hits supply, with chief Fatih Birol warning of a severe global energy crisis.
